# Copilot Instructions

Always read and follow:

1. `.ai-context/project.md`
2. `.ai-context/conventions.md`
3. `.ai-context/architecture.md`
4. `.ai-context/data-schema.md`

Authoritative specs:

- `docs/SPEC-01-content-bot.md`
- `docs/SPEC-02-web-system.md`
- `docs/SPEC-03-monetisation.md`
- `docs/SPEC-04-video-pipeline.md`

Primary implementation directories:

- `apps/bot/`
- `apps/web/`
- `packages/shared-types/`
